title: Fractions on a Number Line
essential_question: How can you represent and locate fractions on a number line?
strategies: count lengths from 0 to locate fraction

pretest.question: A number line from 0 to 1 is divided into 4 equal parts. What fraction does the first mark after 0 represent?
pretest.explanation: 4 equal parts → the first mark is at 1/4.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.5 'Fractions on a Number Line' pp.329-332
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic C — Comparing Unit Fractions and Specifying the Whole
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

pretest.question: A number line from 0 to 1 is divided into 3 equal parts. What fraction does the point at the second mark represent?
pretest.explanation: Second mark out of 3 equal parts = 2/3.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.5 'Fractions on a Number Line' pp.329-332
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic C — Comparing Unit Fractions and Specifying the Whole
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

pretest.question: On a number line from 0 to 1, where is 0/4 located?
pretest.explanation: 0/4 = 0, which is at the very start of the number line.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.5 'Fractions on a Number Line' pp.329-332
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic C — Comparing Unit Fractions and Specifying the Whole
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

pretest.question: A number line from 0 to 1 is divided into 6 equal parts. A point is at the 4th mark. What fraction is it?

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.5 'Fractions on a Number Line' pp.329-332
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic C — Comparing Unit Fractions and Specifying the Whole
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

pretest.question: On a number line from 0 to 1 divided into 8 equal parts, what fraction is at the same point as 1?
pretest.explanation: The end of the number line is 1 = 8/8.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.5 'Fractions on a Number Line' pp.329-332
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic C — Comparing Unit Fractions and Specifying the Whole
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Fractions on a Number Line
learn.content: A number line from 0 to 1 can be divided into equal parts, just like a shape. If you divide it into 4 equal lengths, the marks show 0/4, 1/4, 2/4, 3/4, and 4/4.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.5 'Fractions on a Number Line' pp.329-332
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic C — Comparing Unit Fractions and Specifying the Whole
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Locating a Fraction
learn.content: To find a fraction on a number line: 1) Look at the denominator — it tells how many equal lengths between 0 and 1. 2) Count from 0 the number of lengths shown by the numerator. Example: 3/4 → divide into 4 parts, count 3 from 0.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.5 'Fractions on a Number Line' pp.329-332
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic C — Comparing Unit Fractions and Specifying the Whole
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Endpoints
learn.content: 0/4 is at 0 (the start). 4/4 is at 1 (the end). Any fraction with 0 as the numerator equals 0. Any fraction where numerator = denominator equals 1.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.5 'Fractions on a Number Line' pp.329-332
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic C — Comparing Unit Fractions and Specifying the Whole
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 점프 세기 방법 — 0에서 출발
learn.content: 수직선에서 a/b를 찾으려면: 0에서 출발해 1/b씩 a번 점프한다. 예: 3/4 → 0에서 1/4씩 3번 점프 → 3번째 눈금. 예: 5/6 → 0에서 1/6씩 5번 점프 → 5번째 눈금. 🔍 핵심: 분자 a = 점프 횟수, 분모 b = 점프 한 번의 크기.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.5 'Fractions on a Number Line' pp.329-332
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic C — Comparing Unit Fractions and Specifying the Whole
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 눈금에 라벨 붙이기 — 0/b부터 b/b까지
learn.content: 0~1을 b등분하면 b+1개의 눈금이 생김. 왼쪽부터 0/b, 1/b, 2/b, …, b/b (=1). 예: 4등분 → 0/4, 1/4, 2/4, 3/4, 4/4. 끝점 0 = 0/b, 끝점 1 = b/b. 흔한 실수 (M01): 칸 수와 눈금 수 혼동 — 칸이 b개면 눈금은 b+1개.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.5 'Fractions on a Number Line' pp.329-332
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic C — Comparing Unit Fractions and Specifying the Whole
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 분모는 칸 수 — 0~1을 몇 등분?
learn.content: 분모 b는 0과 1 사이를 몇 칸으로 나눴는지 알려줌. 분모 4 → 4칸 / 분모 6 → 6칸 / 분모 8 → 8칸. 분모가 클수록 한 칸의 길이는 짧고, 같은 거리를 가는 데 더 많은 점프가 필요. 🔍 빠른 검산: 1까지 b번 점프했는가?

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.5 'Fractions on a Number Line' pp.329-332
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic C — Comparing Unit Fractions and Specifying the Whole
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 분수 = 0에서의 거리
learn.content: 수직선 위의 a/b는 단순한 점이 아니라 '0에서 그 점까지의 거리'를 의미. 예: 3/4는 0에서 출발해 전체 길이의 3/4만큼 떨어진 위치. 이 관점은 분수 비교에도 도움 — 0에서 더 멀면 더 큰 분수. 예: 3/4 > 2/4 (3/4가 0에서 더 멀리 있음).

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.5 'Fractions on a Number Line' pp.329-332
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic C — Comparing Unit Fractions and Specifying the Whole
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 수직선 분수 3단계 루틴
learn.content: 낯선 분수 a/b를 수직선에 표시할 때 3단계:   단계 1) 0과 1 사이를 분모 b만큼 같은 칸으로 나눈다.   단계 2) 0부터 시작해 분자 a번 점프한다.   단계 3) a번째 눈금이 a/b의 위치. 예: 5/8 → 8칸으로 나누고 5번째 눈금. 흔한 실수 (M02): 분모 만큼 칸으로 나누지 않고 자기 마음대로 — 반드시 같은 길이로 b등분 했는지 검증.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.5 'Fractions on a Number Line' pp.329-332
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 5 Topic C — Comparing Unit Fractions and Specifying the Whole
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

practice_r2.question: Ben marks a point on a number line from 0 to 1. The point is past the halfway mark but not at 1. The line is divided into 4 equal parts. Where could Ben's point be?
practice_r2.explanation: Halfway is 2/4. Past halfway but not at 1 (4/4) means 3/4.
hints: Think about what fractions on a number line means.
Try drawing a picture or using a number line.

practice_r3.question: On a number line from 0 to 1, the point for 2/6 and the point for 1/3 are at the same location. Why?
choices: Because the denominators are both even
practice_r3.explanation: 2/6 simplifies to 1/3. Equivalent fractions are at the same point on a number line.
hints: Think about what fractions on a number line means.
Try drawing a picture or using a number line.

practice_r3.question: A number line from 0 to 1 is divided into 8 equal parts. Ella says 4/8 is the same as 1/2. How can you check on the number line?
choices: 4/8 is the 4th mark; 1/2 is the middle mark. They are the same point.
Count 4 marks from the right; that is 1/2.
You cannot check without a ruler.
practice_r3.explanation: On 8 equal parts, the 4th mark is exactly in the middle (halfway), which is also 1/2.
hints: Think about what fractions on a number line means.
Try drawing a picture or using a number line.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is A. Remember how fractions on a number line works.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.8 Lesson 8.5 'Fractions on a Number Line' pp.329-332

verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015
